revision.comment: {{r from singular}} just redirects here, this isn't needed
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to plural
  |name=To its plural form
  |from=a singular noun
  |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}}
  |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples:
*** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Scissors]]
*** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Trousers]]
** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects to plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to plural
  |name=To its plural form
  |from=a singular noun
  |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}}
  |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples:
*** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Scissors]]
*** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Trousers]]
** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects to plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to plural
  |name=To its plural form
  |from=a singular noun
  |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}}
  |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples:
*** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]]
*** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Trousers]]
** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects to plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to plural
  |name=To its plural form
  |from=a singular noun
  |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}}
  |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples:
*** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]]
*** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]]
** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects to plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to plural
  |name=To its plural form
  |from=a singular noun
  |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}}
  |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples:
*** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]]
*** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]]
** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects to plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to plural |name=To its plural form |from=a singular noun |to=its plural form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the plural form is "{{{of|}}}"}} |info=** Redirects of this sort exist for reader convenience in cases of singular–plural pairs. It is also used for "false singulars", wherein the plural or plural-looking form is better attested in usage, such that the normal "[[WP:SINGULAR|prefer the singular]]" Wikipedia naming convention is not followed. Examples: *** {{-r|Scissor}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Scissors|Scissors]] *** {{-r|Trouser}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Trousers|Trousers]] ** Use this rcat to tag qualified [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects {{em|only}}; if qualified singular forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects to plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
